info.name: RecipeScanner API
info.description:
Tests de la API RecipeScanner — Holberton School RNCP 5 DWWM.

Instrucciones:
1. Importar este archivo en Postman (File > Import)
2. Importar RecipeScanner_environment.json y seleccionar entorno 'RecipeScanner Dev'
3. Ejecutar en orden: Auth → Recipes → Ingredients → Scan → Security

El request 'Login — success' guarda el token automáticamente en {{token}}.

item.name: 1 — Auth
item.description: Registro, login y gestión del perfil. Ejecutar en orden.

exec: pm.test('Response has JWT token — saved to {{token}}', function () {
pm.test('Same error for wrong password and unknown email (no info leak)', function () {
pm.test('Returns user data without password_hash', function () {
pm.test('Same error message as wrong password (no info leak)', function () {

item.name: 2 — Recipes

}

item.description: Subir PDF para extraer receta con Groq. Requiere JWT. Seleccionar el PDF manualmente en el request.

item.name: Upload PDF — MANUAL (run individually, select file first)
7 — Cross-User Security
item.description: Verifica que un usuario no pueda modificar datos de otro.

item.name: PUT /me — update email to user2 email (400)

exec: pm.test('Status 400 — email already used by another user', function () {
pm.test('Error says already in use', function () {
pm.test('Returns user2 data not user1', function () {

pm.test('Recipe still exists after forbidden delete', function () {
